nodes_renamed_or_merged.ABI4: merged into ABI4_5 composite (with ABI5 from E247/E248 curated edges)

applied_suggestions.notes: Founder-cell marker restored. LR activators go from 6 to 7 (at hard cap after PUCHI drop).

WOX11 included; WOX12 paralog deferred (E223 is WOX12->LBD16, could be added as second WOX11-parallel input but kept simple for iter 2). Auxin now has 2 outgoing edges (TIR1 + WOX11) - documented minor Perception Gate leak. Gate integrity for LR core cascade (TIR1 -> IAA14 -> ARF) preserved because WOX11 is a parallel TF, not a direct LR effector.

BR module added with Perception Gate (BR -> BRI1 sole outgoing). BZR composite covers both BZR1 and BES1 (E236/E237 and E238/E239 are composite-represented). bzr1-1D and bes1-D tests can now reconcile as composite member gain-of-function. To fit BZR->LR under hard-cap 7 activators, PUCHI->LR direct was dropped and PUCHI node removed.

HY5 routed via ARF19 (not LR direct) as JUDGE recommended to stay under inhibitor cap. Far_Red/PHYA arm deferred - PHYB alone gives constitutive HY5 source for shoot-root integration. ARF19 inhibitors go from 2 (IAA14, IAA28) to 3 (+HY5); within cap.

edges_removed_as_part_of_restructure: SNRK2 -> ABI4 (iter-1 edge, replaced by SNRK2 -> ABI4_5)
ABI4 -> LR (iter-1 edge, replaced by ABI4_5 -> LR)
applied_suggestions.notes: Merged ABI4 and ABI5 into composite ABI4_5 per JUDGE's preferred option (a). ABA now has 2 outgoing edges (PYL8 gate-primary + ABI4_5 bypass for ABI5 via E247) - documented minor gate leak. SNRK2 arm preserved as gate-pure route for ABI4 (via E149).

rejected_suggestions.reason: Applies TOLS2->PUCHI and RLK7->PUCHI, but PUCHI node was dropped in iter 2 to fit BR module (S003 HIGH) under LR activator hard-cap 7. Re-adding PUCHI in iter 3 requires dropping another LR activator or routing PUCHI through a non-curated intermediate (literature_gap). Deferring for now.

NAC4->LR direct edge would push LR activator count from 7 to 8, exceeding the hard cap of 7 (BUILDER_AGENT.md §10 / CLAUDE.md §10). NAC4 cannot be routed via ANR1 (no curated NAC4->ANR1 edge) or via ARF7 (no curated NAC4->ARF7). To include the AFB3->NAC4 arm would require either: (a) collapsing ANR1 + NAC4 into a nitrate-TF composite, or (b) dropping ANR1->LR and routing NLP7/ANR1 via an alternative path (none curated). Defer to iter 3 or leave as literature_gap.

deferred_as_literature_gap: S010 ARR_B->SHY2/IAA3 transcriptional induction - curated still lacks this edge (noted in literature_judge_report residual_gaps_for_builder)
S011 EIN3 downstream targets - curated still lacks EIN3->TAA1 etc.
S012 SMXL6/7/8 nodes for SL Perception Gate completion

ABA_outgoing: ABI4_5 (minor leak, ABI5 composite arm, documented)
